nodes.name: select.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for SELECT statement fundamentals, covering column expressions, aliases, DISTINCT, ORDER BY, and subquery semantics.

nodes.name: select_distinct.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for SELECT DISTINCT and COUNT(DISTINCT), verifying duplicate elimination and GROUP BY interactions.

nodes.name: select_distinct_on.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for SELECT DISTINCT ON, verifying that the first row per distinct key group is selected correctly.

nodes.name: select_having.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for HAVING clauses in aggregated queries, verifying post-aggregate filter behavior with various conditions.

nodes.name: select_implicit.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for implicit column references and GROUP BY column number notation, verifying SQL standard compatibility.

nodes.name: select_into.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for SELECT INTO and CREATE TABLE AS SELECT, verifying table creation from query results with proper column types.

nodes.name: select_parallel.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for parallel query execution, verifying that the planner uses parallel scan/aggregate plans for eligible queries.

nodes.name: select_views.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for SELECT from views, verifying view expansion, security barrier views, and view update semantics.

nodes.name: sequence.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for sequences (CREATE SEQUENCE), covering nextval, currval, setval, serial columns, and sequence ownership.

nodes.name: spgist.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for SP-GiST indexes, verifying spatial partitioning tree index creation and query use for geometric and range types.

nodes.name: stats.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for statistics collection, verifying pg_stat_* views, track_activities, and pg_stat_reset() behavior.

nodes.name: stats_ext.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for extended statistics (CREATE STATISTICS), covering MCV, dependency, and ndistinct statistic types.

nodes.name: strings.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for string functions and operators, covering concatenation, trimming, pattern matching, and encoding functions.

nodes.name: subscription.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for logical replication subscriptions (CREATE/ALTER/DROP SUBSCRIPTION) and their interaction with publications.

nodes.name: subselect.sql
nodes.summary: Comprehensive PostgreSQL regression test for subqueries, covering scalar subqueries, IN/EXISTS, correlated subqueries, lateral joins, and subquery flattening.

nodes.name: sysviews.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for system views (pg_indexes, pg_tables, pg_views, etc.), verifying that system catalog views return expected data.

nodes.name: tablesample.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the TABLESAMPLE clause, covering BERNOULLI and SYSTEM sampling methods with repeatable seeding.

nodes.name: temp.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for temporary tables, covering session and transaction-scoped temp tables, temp schemas, and persistence behavior.

nodes.name: text.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the text data type, covering comparison, pattern matching, concatenation, and text-specific functions.

nodes.name: tid.sql
nodes.summary: PostgreSQL regression test for the tid (tuple identifier / ctid) data type, verifying TID parsing, comparison, and ctid-based scans.
